---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report a maintenance or housekeeping task
title: "Maintenance: [Short description]"
labels: maintenance
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Scope
What parts of the project does this maintenance affect? (e.g. codebase, dependencies, documentation)

## Impact
What is the expected impact of completing this maintenance? (e.g. improved performance, reduced technical debt)

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
